candidates.description: Automate monthly API calculation usage retrieval and summary.
triggerPatterns: how many api calculations have i used this month

candidates.description: Automate retrieval and presentation of all available Mapp Intelligence dimensions and metrics via MCP, including counts and optional export.
triggerPatterns: list all dimensions and metrics in mapp
what dimensions are available in mapp intelligence
catalog of mapp dimensions and metrics

candidates.description: Automate running the Mapp Intelligence Cohorts Performance report via the report-query API with configurable time ranges, cohort definitions, and metric sets. Handle deterministic polling and return a concise summary with validation of non-empty results.

Automate consolidation of multiple cohort-monitor results into a single comparative report, computing absolute and relative deltas, parity gaps, trends vs baseline, and generating concise insights and recommended actions.
triggerPatterns: compare conversion for vip and new-user

candidates.description: Validate that cohort pulls share consistent time windows and baseline definitions; recompute percent changes from raw values, detect identical outputs across cohorts, and flag anomalies prior to recommendation.
